topics.title: Internet Promotion and Upcoming Show Premieres
topics.summary: The show highlights a two-day free internet promotion, the upcoming premiere of a new sitcom called The Bitter Half, and various segments involving guest appearances and listener interactions.

topics.title: Radio Show Highlights and Promotions
topics.summary: The studio presents a compilation of past segments featuring adult film stars, shocking stunts involving electric shocks and bikini waxes, and an overview of upcoming programming on their satellite network.

topics.title: Radio Show Segments and Guest Interviews
topics.summary: The studio features a series of segments including prank phone calls, discussions on the production of the show, and an interview with Danny Bonaducci regarding his reality television appearance.

topics.title: Danny Bonaducci's Marriage and Career
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with Danny Bonaducci regarding his marital struggles over internet interactions, his physical endurance during stunts for VH1, and the promotion of his clothing line.

topics.title: Danny Partridge's Television Career and Personal Life
topics.summary: The studio features Danny Partridge discussing his roles on CSI and a reality show, his personal life with his wife, and the challenges of maintaining his public persona.

topics.title: Danny Bonaducci Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts Danny Bonaducci to discuss his television career, personal struggles with sobriety, and his experiences filming high-stakes physical stunts for television.

topics.title: The Bitter Half Premiere
topics.summary: The studio introduces and previews a fictional sitcom titled "The Bitter Half," which explores the secret lives of the show's cast members through various comedic sketches.

topics.title: The Bitter Half Sitcom Review
topics.summary: The studio reviews the production of "The Bitter Half," a half-hour radio sitcom, and discusses the performances of various cast members.

topics.title: Radio Show Highlights and Upcoming Roast
topics.summary: The studio reviews recent segments featuring Beth and Riley Martin while discussing upcoming guests, listener feedback from international fans, and a planned comedy roast.

topics.title: Comedy, Celebrity Gossip, and Pete Townsend
topics.summary: The show features a discussion on stand-up comedy, celebrity rumors involving Michael Jackson and Madonna, an interaction with a California official regarding local issues, and preparations for an interview with Pete Townsend.

topics.title: Pete Townsend and Roger Daltrey Interview
topics.summary: The studio discusses the challenges of hearing loss in radio, reports on local news items, and addresses a tense situation regarding an interview with Pete Townsend following a controversial topic being raised during the broadcast.

topics.title: Interview with Roger Daltrey
topics.summary: The studio hosts a conversation with Roger Daltrey of The Who regarding his career, the band's finances, and an apology to Pete Townshend for a missed interview.

topics.title: The Who New Album and Tour
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with Roger Daltrey regarding the band's new album, their touring experiences, and a discussion about Pete Townshend's absence from the broadcast.

topics.title: Pete Townsend Interview and Satellite Radio Promotion
topics.summary: The studio discusses the fallout from an interview with Pete Townsend, the promotion of Howard TV on cable and satellite platforms, and the ongoing challenges regarding broadcast regulations.

topics.title: Radio Show News and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The show features discussions on listener interactions, upcoming segments like the "Gary roast," a contest for an ex-convict, news regarding Lindsay Lohan and Kate Hudson, and a report on a man arrested for animal cruelty.

topics.title: Upcoming Roast and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding an upcoming roast event, rumors about Carmen Electra's appearance fees, legal issues involving Wesley Snipes, and a humorous segment involving Shaquille O'Neal.

topics.title: Current Events and Upcoming Show Promotions
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including Madonna's interview with Oprah, the upcoming wedding of Tom Cruise and Katie Holmes, debates over stem cell research in Missouri, and various news reports regarding international conflicts and local legal cases.
